description_long: This is a tall, modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a multi-tiered structure. The facade features a combination of white and black panels, with large, regularly spaced windows and multiple balconies on nearly every floor. The lower levels include a podium with landscaped terraces adorned with small trees and planters, providing green space for residents. The uppermost section of the building has a stepped design, with rooftop amenities and mechanical structures visible. The building's overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with strong vertical lines and a symmetrical window arrangement. The main entrance is prominent at the base, likely accessible from the street level.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with white and black facades, regular balconies, and landscaped terraces on the lower podium.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's stepped rooftop, landscaped terrace on the right, and the main entrance area at the base.
description_view_1: This view shows the symmetrical front facade, with prominent balconies and a landscaped terrace wrapping around the left and right sides.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the left-side terrace and the building's vertical lines, with the podium and upper rooftop features visible.
description_view_3: This view displays the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and the terrace extending along the right side.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, vertical grid pattern, with symmetrical spacing and alignment across all facades. Most windows are paired with balconies, creating a rhythmic and organized exterior.
